name: grid-row
author: renzhongyue
desc: The `grid-row` CSS shorthand property specifies a grid item's size and location within the grid row by contributing a line, a span, or nothing (automatic) to its grid placement. It is a shorthand for `grid-row-start` and `grid-row-end`.

notes: Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
Requires `enableGridPlacementShorthands` to be enabled when `engineVersion < 4.1`; it is automatically enabled when `engineVersion >= 4.1`.
When disabled and engineVersion < 4.1, the declaration is rejected by the CSS parser.
Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.

note.literal: Lynx's `<grid-line>` supports `auto`, `<number>`, and `span <number>`. Named grid lines (`<custom-ident>`) are not supported.
